title: SystemVerilog support assignment patters under FUNCREFs
body:
---


Author Name: **Ed Lander**
Original Redmine Issue: 617 from https://www.veripool.org
Original Date: 2013-02-12
Original Assignee: Wilson Snyder (@wsnyder)

---

Hi,

Weâ€™re using the following syntax in our code:

assign
  wire_name	=
     function_name('{ feature : { 6'd0, parameter_1, parameter_2 },
                                          version : constant_name.version }),

And consequently seeing the following error message from Verilator:
Unsupported: Assignment pattern applies against non struct/union: BASICDTYPE 'logic'

Would be nice if this was supported.

Many thanks,
Ed
